news.title:
Apollo Hospitals acquired 775,744 shares of Apollo Health at Rs. 241/share.
The acquisition raised its stake to 99.42%, totaling Rs. 18.7 crores.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals acquired 775,744 shares of Apollo Health at Rs. 241/share.
The acquisition raised its stake to 99.42%, totaling Rs. 18.7 crores.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd received Tribunal approval for a Composite Scheme of Arrangement with Apollo Healthco, Keimed, and Apollo Healthtech.
The scheme aims to enhance operational efficiency, streamline businesses, and enable focused growth in healthcare and pharmacy distribution.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd received Tribunal approval for a Composite Scheme of Arrangement with Apollo Healthco, Keimed, and Apollo Healthtech.
The scheme aims to enhance operational efficiency, streamline businesses, and enable focused growth in healthcare and pharmacy distribution.

news.title:
Kush Bohra shares stock picks like Tata Power, Laurus Labs, Apollo Hospitals, with buy/sell calls and targets.
He highlights Tata Steel, Jindal Steel for bullish outlook; cautions sector rotation into financials.
news.summary:
Kush Bohra shares stock picks like Tata Power, Laurus Labs, Apollo Hospitals, with buy/sell calls and targets.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight on Apollo Hospitals, lowering target to ₹8,833 from ₹9,209.
The revision reflects margin pressures impacting the company.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley retains Overweight on Apollo Hospitals, lowering target to ₹8,833 from ₹9,209.
The revision reflects margin pressures impacting the company.

news.title:
Hospital stocks, underperforming due to Iran war, face medical tourism concerns.
Revenue impact from conflict zones remains minimal for most hospitals, except a few.
news.summary:
Hospital stocks, underperforming due to Iran war, face medical tourism concerns.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd announces NCLT approval for its composite scheme of arrangement involving Apollo Healthco, Keimed Pvt Ltd, and Apollo Healthtech.
The scheme aims to streamline operations, focus on sector-specific efficiencies, and enhance business opportunities for stakeholders.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals Enterprise Ltd announces NCLT approval for its composite scheme of arrangement involving Apollo Healthco, Keimed Pvt Ltd, and Apollo Healthtech.
The scheme aims to streamline operations, focus on sector-specific efficiencies, and enhance business opportunities for stakeholders.

news.title:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.
Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.
news.summary:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals highlights rising expenses but steady demand in India's healthcare.
Suneeta Reddy underscores sector growth despite operational cost challenges.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals highlights rising expenses but steady demand in India's healthcare.
Suneeta Reddy underscores sector growth despite operational cost challenges.

news.title:
Apollo Healthco acquired 100% of Apollo Consumer Products for INR 9L.
This acquisition makes it a wholly owned subsidiary, boosting FMCG distribution.
news.summary:
Apollo Healthco acquired 100% of Apollo Consumer Products for INR 9L.
This acquisition makes it a wholly owned subsidiary, boosting FMCG distribution.

news.title:
Citi gives Apollo Hospitals a Buy rating with a target of Rs. 9,600, implying 27.6% upside from Rs. 7,521.55.
Apollo's growth driven by hospital expansion, digital platform nearing breakeven, and HealthCo's 17-18% CAGR support profitability.
news.summary:
Citi gives Apollo Hospitals a Buy rating with a target of Rs. 9,600, implying 27.6% upside from Rs. 7,521.55.
Apollo's growth driven by hospital expansion, digital platform nearing breakeven, and HealthCo's 17-18% CAGR support profitability.

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals saw an NSE block trade of ~32,157 shares at Rs. 7,435.
The trade's total value was approximately Rs. 23.91 crore.
news.summary:

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals' P/E is at 59.8, above the industry's 55.4, reflecting strong valuation.
Despite short-term decline, Apollo Hospitals' long-term outlook remains robust as a Nifty 50 constituent.
news.summary:
Apollo Hospitals' P/E is at 59.8, above the industry's 55.4, reflecting strong valuation.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal's picks include ICICI Pru AMC, Apollo Hospitals, Bharat Dynamics, Siemens Energy, Jain Resource Recycling, and TBO Tek for growth potential.
Highlights include ICICI Pru AMC's 15% revenue CAGR, Apollo's 22% earnings CAGR, and Bharat Dynamics' strong order book and diversified portfolio.
news.summary:

news.title:
Citi adds Apollo Hospitals to its Pan-Asia Focus List with a 'Buy' rating, target price Rs 9,600.
Citi highlights Apollo's growth in pharmacy, digital profitability, and valuation comfort; flags key risks like high costs.
news.summary:

news.title:
Apollo Hospitals raised stake in Apollo Health to 99.42% by acquiring 30.58% from IFC, IFC EAF.
The acquisition cost Rs. 12,540.7M, with CCI approval received for the transaction.
news.summary:

Despite this, the firm outperforms Sensex across multiple time horizons.
